---
name: source-grounding
description: Collects official VS Code, GitHub Copilot, and Microsoft Learn sources before fork-control repo changes.
---

# Source grounding

Use this skill whenever a change touches:

- fork patch zones
- profile orchestration
- extension-set behavior
- product-owned session visibility
- Copilot customization files
- agent adapter claims

## Procedure

1. Start with `docs/grounding.md`.
2. Prefer official sources:
   - VS Code docs
   - GitHub Docs
   - Microsoft Learn
3. Use web search to find the latest official pages or public issue threads when needed.
4. Update repository docs when a new source materially changes the fork stance or control-repo guidance.

## Minimum evidence set

- At least one official source for the feature surface.
- At least one official source or public issue for any blocked or platform-gap claim.
